reviews.comment:
Que lindo lugar, ahí paramos con mí esposa a descansar y tomar matecuando volvemos de vacaciones!!!

(Translated by Google)
What a lovely place! My wife and I stop there to rest and drink mate when we get back from vacation!

reviews.comment:
En particular yo lo visito de camino a Mar Chiquita o Camet. Me gusta parar para desayunar en el hermoso predio arbolado que tiene.
Tiene además una estación de servicio YPF, y un YPF Full.
Los precios son similares a cualquier shop de estación de servicio (demasiado caros, en comparación con otros comercios).

(Translated by Google)
I usually visit it on my way to Mar Chiquita or Camet. I like to stop for breakfast in its beautiful wooded area.
It also has a YPF gas station and a YPF Full convenience store.
The prices are similar to any gas station shop (too expensive compared to other stores).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNjd1k2LXR3RRAB
